procedure: Hash each immutable artifact and compare exact size/hash to lock table.
pass_criteria: All four hashes and sizes match; mismatch blocks G0.

procedure: Recompute Capability Investigation 44-entry canonical digest from Foundation MANIFEST.
pass_criteria: Count 44, bytes 83876218 and digest dd76ae42...a54 match.

procedure: Compare captured repo status and supplemental repository heads/diffs with pre-P0 record.
pass_criteria: All pre-existing differences preserved and no attribution drift.

procedure: Recheck manifest HEAD/resolved manifest hash and toolchain/product baseline.
pass_criteria: Recorded values reproduce or change is explicitly re-baselined.

procedure: Inventory every P0-00 added path and classify MIME/extension/content.
pass_criteria: Only documentation/status/immutable reference evidence under allowed directory; no executable/source/build/policy/interface.

procedure: Compare Android repo/path status before and after milestone against permitted path map.
pass_criteria: No unauthorized AOSP/framework/build/provider/HAL/ROM/OEM delta.

procedure: Review any normative/reference change for ACP ID, version/hash, threat/privacy/compatibility/migration/test/rollback impact.
pass_criteria: No unapproved architecture or requirement meaning change.

procedure: Verify every stable owner ID maps to accountable named assignee before work starts.
pass_criteria: All active tasks have implementer and independent required reviewers.

procedure: Check task entry/done checklist and evidence before state transition.
pass_criteria: All prerequisites/tests/reviews/rollback satisfied; compile alone rejected.

procedure: Validate dependency graph and G0-G7 predecessor state for each milestone.
pass_criteria: No milestone bypasses incomplete prerequisite/gate; fakes remain test-only.

procedure: Run canonical CBOR/diagnostic JSON/hash/URN/UUIDv7/timestamp/set/map golden vectors.
pass_criteria: Exact canonical bytes/hashes match; noncanonical alternatives reject.

procedure: Exercise size/count/depth/integer/decimal/text/bytes and forbidden float/handle/code limits.
pass_criteria: Limits reject before excessive allocation; prohibited values never validate.

procedure: Validate every object/envelope required field, relationship, enum and state vector.
pass_criteria: All positive vectors accept and every missing/contradictory/unknown authority field rejects.

procedure: Fuzz closed schema/parser with unknown major/enum/field, recursive/remote/executable refs and malformed bytes.
pass_criteria: No crash/hang/OOM; security unknowns fail closed.

procedure: Run SemVer/range/coexistence/upgrade/downgrade/security-change vectors.
pass_criteria: No implicit major coercion or downgrade broadening.

procedure: Static/interface review for generic Bundle/intent/URI/path/Binder/property/shell/reflection/classloader/HAL primitives.
pass_criteria: No prohibited generic primitive exists in contract or endpoint.

procedure: Inject every core error/origin/retry case and inspect caller-visible details.
pass_criteria: Stable typed error; no secret, path, stack or policy-internal leakage.

procedure: Trace each Contract object/state/error/version rule to independent positive/negative vectors.
pass_criteria: 100% normative contract coverage; differential verifier agrees.

procedure: API lint/signature/visibility and absent/dead/incompatible service client tests.
pass_criteria: System/private only; safe typed unavailable; no endpoint selection/context manufacture/cache authority.

procedure: Review each endpoint identity, bounds, threading, timeout, death, user, version, error and security specification.
pass_criteria: All interface freeze fields complete; no LocalServices/reflection/generic IPC.

procedure: Inspect process/class/package graph and runtime loaded code.
pass_criteria: Only minimal Authority core in system_server; Broker/Hub/Audit/Extension/provider/model code absent.

procedure: Review proposed capability bridge against existing manager-first decision algorithm and inaccessible list.
pass_criteria: No direct/generic bridge; exception has separate approved threat model.

procedure: Unit/device tests derive context from trusted Binder/framework facts across UID/user/profile/lock/foreground cases.
pass_criteria: Caller cannot supply/spoof authoritative identity/context; object is short-lived/hash-bound.

procedure: Attempt UID/PID/SID/package/user/attribution/confirmation spoofing including shared/isolated UID.
pass_criteria: All mismatches denied and audited safely.

procedure: Boot with feature off/on, dependencies delayed/dead and user lifecycle transitions.
pass_criteria: Android boot unaffected; service non-ready/disabled until prerequisites.

procedure: Build/rebuild snapshots under input permutations/concurrency/cache corruption and compare generation/root hash/resolution.
pass_criteria: Atomic deterministic exact resolution; cache never activates alone.

procedure: Exercise every allowed/forbidden capability/provider lifecycle transition.
pass_criteria: Only Registry transitions; invalid/provider-self activation rejects.

procedure: Vary build/install/feature/service/version/user/policy/dependency/health facts and expiry.
pass_criteria: Availability precedence/reasons correct; stale becomes UNKNOWN; READY never authorizes.

procedure: Replace/remove/disable/signature-change/downgrade/kill provider/package.
pass_criteria: Binding invalidated atomically in new generation; stale resolution/token rejects.

procedure: Run deterministic decision table across Android facts, grants, risk, parameters, purpose, quota and obligations.
pass_criteria: Same inputs same decision; deny/stronger obligation precedence; missing facts deny.

procedure: Mutate/replay/expire/cross-user/cross-provider/cross-parameter/cross-purpose authorizations and race single-use.
pass_criteria: Every mismatch/replay rejects; exact valid synthetic token verifies once/as bounded.

procedure: Submit provider/extension advice that lowers risk/grants/trust or claims policy authority.
pass_criteria: Advice cannot lower platform result or issue final allow.

procedure: Change grant/policy/Registry/user/shutdown/emergency epochs during decisions/tokens/leases.
pass_criteria: Affected cached state invalidates immediately; no new dispatch/delivery.

procedure: Reserve/append/recover ledger under kill/power-loss, duplicate/reorder/tamper/delete/disk-full/corrupt and forbidden payload.
pass_criteria: Durable required reserve, tamper detection, deterministic recovery, secret exclusion, fail closed.

procedure: Verify unique writer/domain/store, DE/CE user lifecycle and caller permissions.
pass_criteria: Broker/provider/UI cannot rewrite/read raw ledger; correct partitions open/close/purge.

procedure: Fuzz/validate request framing, bounds, schema, purpose, dependencies, idempotency and generation.
pass_criteria: Malformed/oversized/conflicting/stale requests reject before dispatch.

procedure: Inject provider outcomes/results/errors/partial/accepted and schema/data-policy violations.
pass_criteria: Only valid minimized typed response returns; invalid provider output fails safely.

procedure: Race cancel/timeout/death/restart/idempotency/async/unknown outcome at every state.
pass_criteria: One deterministic terminal/recovery state; non-idempotent unknown never auto-retries.

procedure: Attempt production dispatch, arbitrary endpoint/service/HAL/content access and inspect permissions.
pass_criteria: Only exact engineering no-op dispatch works in TEST_NO_OP; zero ambient Android authority.

procedure: API/dependency review Provider Framework/SDK for policy, minting, discovery, generic manager/intent/URI/path functionality.
pass_criteria: No authority-bearing or generic adapter functionality; library has no privilege.

procedure: No-op provider verifies caller/audience/user/version/hash/nonce/expiry/replay then structured result/cancel/health.
pass_criteria: Every invalid authorization rejects before provider behavior; callee recheck hooks mandatory.

procedure: Inspect engineering and production product/APEX installed target lists and permissions.
pass_criteria: No-op/test mode only engineering; absent from production; zero capability permissions.

procedure: Stress synthetic sources/consumers with sustained flood, queue/memory pressure, slow/dead peers and revocation.
pass_criteria: Bounded resource use/backpressure; no Authority/Broker blockage; clean unregister/purge.

procedure: Mutate lease principal/user/source/schema/purpose/budget/epochs/expiry and attempt self-issued lease.
pass_criteria: All mismatch/self-issued/expired/revoked deliveries reject.

procedure: Inject duplicate/out-of-order/replay/gap/restart snapshot/event records.
pass_criteria: Correct dedupe/order partition/gap markers; snapshot vs transition semantics preserved.

procedure: Inspect raw-to-record-to-queue-to-consumer and metadata Audit for classification/minimization/redaction/retention.
pass_criteria: Only policy-allowed minimized fields persist/deliver; sensitive payload absent from Audit.

procedure: Embed action-like data/token in records and attempt action without fresh request/policy.
pass_criteria: Payload/token rejected or inert; action always needs new transaction.

procedure: Fuzz signed manifest/descriptor/schema with malformed, recursive, remote, oversized, downgrade and authority claims.
pass_criteria: Candidate quarantines safely; no crash/OOM/hang; no execution/admission mutation.

procedure: Test publisher/signing lineage/namespace ownership/package version/content hash conflicts.
pass_criteria: Only exact authorized namespace lineage yields candidate evidence.

procedure: Attempt code/class/native load, Registry mutation, token/policy call, Broker/provider access and cache poisoning.
pass_criteria: All prohibited access structurally/SELinux denied; active generation unaffected.

procedure: Attempt arbitrary exported component/intent fallback and self-risk/permission assignment.
pass_criteria: No fallback; AppFunction metadata quarantine only in P0.

procedure: Mutate/replay/expire challenge across user/provider/parameter/purpose/auth; test overlay/obscured touch/process death.
pass_criteria: Only exact trusted fresh synthetic proof accepted; spoof/replay/cancel rejects.

procedure: Test Settings/SystemUI health/grant/history/kill-switch across absent/dead/incompatible runtime and users.
pass_criteria: UI never executes or owns policy; administration scoped; restart grants nothing.

procedure: Exercise critical synthetic flow with strong auth, exact confirmation, single-use/no-retry and Audit.
pass_criteria: All critical controls required and bound; no silent/automatic path.

procedure: Run owner/work/secondary/guest user and start/lock/unlock/switch/stop/remove/cross-profile matrix.
pass_criteria: No cross-user reuse/leak; DE/CE and state teardown correct.

procedure: Inspect isolated/model/learning and test identities for permissions, service-manager access, storage/network/device/proc/sysfs.
pass_criteria: No ambient Android authority or privileged persistent access.

procedure: Verify unique UID/domain/service/file identities and exact add/find/call edges in enforcing mode.
pass_criteria: Only declared edge matrix succeeds; no shared broad domain/UID.

procedure: Attempt raw HAL/device/native socket/property/init/proc/sysfs/kernel/content/generic Binder access from each ProdX domain.
pass_criteria: Every prohibited raw edge denied; no permissive/auditallow workaround.

procedure: Test wrong cert/signing rotation/privapp allowlist/service identity/Treble partition cases.
pass_criteria: Signing alone grants nothing; only reviewed lineage+permission+SELinux+Registry passes.

procedure: Compare privileges/data/storage/interfaces across provider families/test provider and attempt cross-family use.
pass_criteria: No cross-family privilege or shared store/process leakage.

procedure: Enumerate runtime Binder/service-manager topology and attempt every prohibited direct edge.
pass_criteria: Only Section 5 logical topology exists; prohibited model/UI/Settings/extension/Broker edges denied.

procedure: Verify file labels, owner/mode, single writer, CE/DE, lock/remove, migration and power-loss behavior.
pass_criteria: No writable sharing; correct user scope; safe recovery/deletion.

procedure: Boot through all phases with dependencies delayed/missing/dead, users locked/unlocked and services started in order.
pass_criteria: Authority non-ready first; Audit/Registry precede Broker/Hub; capability scoped readiness.

procedure: Inject missing/dead/stale/revoked/locked/unknown state at each decision/dispatch boundary.
pass_criteria: Typed fail-closed result; no broader fallback.

procedure: Kill/restart each process and system_server before/after every cross-process transition.
pass_criteria: Fresh attestation/epochs/generation; deterministic recovery; unknown effect not success/retry.

procedure: Test graceful shutdown and abrupt power loss at authorization/queue/audit checkpoints.
pass_criteria: No correctness dependence on callback; stale objects invalid after reboot.

procedure: Boot/install/disable/remove runtime services/module and test safe mode/crash loop.
pass_criteria: Android boots/functions with ProdX absent/disabled/quarantined/rolled back.

procedure: Stage update/downgrade/rollback with identity/protocol/schema/data compatibility variations.
pass_criteria: Incompatible quarantines; drain/revoke/checkpoint; no permissive data interpretation.

procedure: Run documented global rollback and verify epochs, leases, services, Audit, data and Android regression.
pass_criteria: Last safe gate restored; stale authority denied; no orphan permissive policy.

procedure: Analyze target/source dependency graph and visibility against approved module map.
pass_criteria: No forbidden cycle/link; Authority/Audit/contract independence preserved.

procedure: Build graph/API/boot comparison with empty disabled skeleton.
pass_criteria: No runtime behavior, public API or unintended product inclusion.

procedure: Measure system_server work, IPC latency, queue/parser resource ceilings and flood behavior.
pass_criteria: No unbounded/blocking payload/model/content/provider work on critical threads; quotas hold.

procedure: Trace every field through collection, transform, IPC, persistence, retention/deletion and learning eligibility.
pass_criteria: Only purpose-minimized approved fields flow; learning remains non-authoritative.

procedure: Run full synthetic request through context/Registry/Policy/UI/Audit/Broker/no-op and synthetic observation/extension paths.
pass_criteria: Exact ordered paths pass; production dispatch/real capability absent.

procedure: Mutate caller/user/purpose/parameters/provider/versions/epochs/time at each handoff.
pass_criteria: End-to-end binding mismatch rejects at or before callee.

procedure: Add components one-by-one in prescribed order with boot/regression after each.
pass_criteria: Each increment works/rolls back independently; no later component masks failure.

procedure: Inventory source/targets/packages/APEX/permissions/processes on production-like image.
pass_criteria: No real/no-op provider, test mode, model/learning or executable capability; P0 substrate only.

procedure: Attempt to enable modes beyond DISABLED/INVENTORY/SHADOW/engineering TEST_NO_OP.
pass_criteria: Unsupported modes structurally unavailable; production default disabled/inventory.

procedure: Assemble and hash required source/contract/interface/target/install/policy/test/signing/Registry/migration evidence.
pass_criteria: Complete internally consistent evidence package with independent approvals.
